name: Rampant Basaltique
description: Créature reptilienne aux écailles de basalte noir, rampant sous les ruines. Sa mâchoire broie l'acier comme du sable.
prompt: Dark sci-fi fantasy, small reptilian creature made of black basalt rock, glowing orange cracks, crawling through rubble ruins, multiple small glowing eyes, smoke from its body, cinematic lighting, highly detailed
